metadata.description: Structured plan-first development plugin for Claude Code with .flow/ task tracking, Agent Teams, and Ralph autonomous mode

plugins.name: flow-code
plugins.description: Zero-dependency planning + execution with .flow/ task tracking. Agent Teams mode with plain-text protocol and file locking. Ralph autonomous mode with multi-model review gates. Git worktree isolation for parallel execution. 20 subagents, 22+ CLI commands, 23 skills.
